---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for the Zakah Calculator
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Is This Related to a Problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g., "I'm always frustrated when...")

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case
Explain why this feature would be useful to you or other users. Provide examples if possible.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or references that support this feature request.

## Scholarly / Religious Context (if applicable)
If this relates to Zakah calculation methodology, asset classification, or Islamic rulings:
- What school of Islamic jurisprudence (madhab) does this relate to? (e.g., Hanafi, Shafi'i, Maliki, Hanbali)
- Are there specific scholarly references or fatwas you'd like to cite?
- How does this improve accuracy or comprehensiveness?

## Acknowledgment
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] This feature aligns with the calculator's scope (Zakah calculation for individuals)
- [ ] I understand this project is maintained by volunteers
